name: sfxMaster

consumes.minimum: 1 or more compositions selected in the Project panel
consumes.description: Reads app.project.selection — expects one or more CompItem entries. For each comp it iterates all layers, identifying audio-only FootageItem layers (hasVideo === false) and nested CompItem layers (processed recursively). Inspects each audio layer's Marker property to classify it as Voice Over, Music, or Sound Effects. Also checks whether any audio layer already has a Stereo Mixer effect with expressions so it can prompt before overwriting.

functions: create 'SFX CTRL' null layer in each selected composition
add three Slider Control effects (Voice Over, Sound Effects, Music) to the SFX CTRL null
scan compositions recursively for audio-only layers
categorize each audio layer as Voice Over, Music, or Sound Effects via its first marker comment
apply Stereo Mixer effect to each audio layer
link Stereo Mixer Left Level and Right Level to the appropriate SFX CTRL slider via expressions
detect pre-existing Stereo Mixer expressions and optionally overwrite them after a confirm dialog
wrap all mutations in a single 'Apply Stereo Mixer' undo group

scriptSim.scenario: success — SFX CTRL created, Stereo Mixer linked to Music slider
scriptSim.inputs: Project with one selected comp ('Ad Sequence') containing one audio-only layer ('BGMusic.wav') whose first marker comment is 'music'; no pre-existing Stereo Mixer effects.

sim.note: Sweeps the Music slider on SFX CTRL from -48 dB to +6 dB and plots the Left Level output, which equals the slider value 1-to-1.
Sweeps the Music slider on SFX CTRL from -48 dB to +6 dB and plots the Right Level output, which mirrors Left Level exactly.

notes: HEADLESS: no ScriptUI; runs as an IIFE with no dialog (except the optional confirm for overwrite).
Audio categorization is determined by the first marker comment only; 'voice over' → Voice Over slider, 'music' → Music slider, anything else (including no marker) → Sound Effects slider.
The script checks app.project.selection, not app.project.activeItem — compositions must be selected in the Project panel, not merely open in the timeline.
Nested compositions are recursively processed; the expression in each nested audio layer always references the top-level (main) comp's SFX CTRL by name.

If a Stereo Mixer effect already exists without expressions, the code path adds a second Stereo Mixer rather than reusing the existing one (the addProperty branch runs when stereoMixer is truthy and overwrite is false).
All mutations are wrapped in a single undo group named 'Apply Stereo Mixer' (not 'SFX Master' as the JSDoc states — the actual code uses 'Apply Stereo Mixer').
Expression slider dB range of [-48, 6] is a representative mix-engineering range; AE Slider Control allows any numeric value.
